name: github_delete_app_authorization
description: DELETE /applications/{client_id}/grant — revoke app grant and all OAuth tokens for the token owner (204). Required: client_id, access_token (sensitive). Typically needs OAuth/GitHub App client credentials, not a Bearer PAT.

client_id.description: The client ID of the GitHub app.

access_token.description: The OAuth access token used to authenticate to the GitHub API. Sensitive; do not log.
